title: Full Transcript: SNDL Q1 2026 Earnings Call
text: Net revenue of $196 million in the first quarter of 2026 represented a 4.4% year over year decline driven by market contractions impacted our different segments. After 16 consecutive quarters of operational improvement, both our liquor and cannabis markets experienced declines in same store sales. These actions are expected to boost profitability and improve commercial execution, generating more than 20 million in incremental operating income over the remainder of the year. The cannabis operations segment experienced significant headwinds including destocking activity, lower production volumes, and inventory adjustments that compressed gross margins from 26.8% to 19.7%. Management highlighted the potential benefits of cannabis rescheduling to Schedule 3, particularly for their SunStream investment exposure through medical operators like Parallel in Florida and Texas. The company repurchased 4.5 million shares during Q1 2026, continuing its board-approved program based on perceived undervaluation.
